episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 348: BRO Reveals Continue
episode.description: James and Derek guide you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering and MTGFinance news and products including Modern & Pioneer MTGO metagame analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and a deep dive on the 30th Secret Lair Advent results and the latest BRO card spoilers.
